description_long: This bungalow features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a spacious front porch supported by columns, extending across the main facade. The exterior walls are painted in a light green hue, with contrasting sections in gray and brown, and the structure includes both open and enclosed spaces. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private, walled garden area with a green lawn, while the side and back extensions add functional living space. The building sits on a white-tiled platform, with a green strip of landscaping along the front. The overall design blends traditional bungalow elements with modern touches, making it suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A light green bungalow with a large gable roof, front porch, and a private rear garden, featuring asymmetrical windows and modern extensions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, green landscaping, and main entrance with supporting columns.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the enclosed garden, flat-roofed extensions, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Back corner view displaying the walled garden, rear porch, and side extension with a secondary entrance.
description_view_3: Side view showing the brown extension, roof complexity, and partial visibility of the front porch and garden.
